title: cyclosorus hispidulus
intro: Cyclosorus hispidulus, also known as the spiny cyclosorus or hispidous fern, is a type of fern species belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus hispidulus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
